title: Mob Repellent
description: Effortlessly prevent mobs from spawning around your base!
body:
![Now Available For Fabric](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Hyperbole-Devs/vectors/fca75d1538bd9503d77d0744be56c8cc58ff1bfa/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_vector.svg)  ![Available For NeoForge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/74adf3b26de1006e9ec9fcffff17322ae3962f9b/assets/cozy/supported/neoforge_vector-cozy.svg)

**Mob Repellent** is a mod that introduces new blocks called **Braziers**. Once ignited with a flint and steel or fire charge, these powerful blocks prevent monsters from spawning naturally within a spherical radius of 60 blocks (Terracotta) / 40 blocks (Stone) / 20 blocks (Wooden) to protect your base and surroundings. They can be extinguished using a water bucket.

By default, the Wooden and Stone Braziers require maintenance. They will randomly extinguish themselves after preventing a mob from spawning!

### Crafting Recipes

**Terracotta Brazier**: _1 Block of Coal, 1 Echo Shard and 5 Terracotta_

**Stone Brazier**: _3 Smooth Stone Slabs, 4 Cobblestone, 1 Block of Coal, 1 Heart of the Sea_

**Wooden Brazier**: _6 Sticks, 1 Wooden Slab, 1 Block of Coal, 1 Amethyst Shard_

![Brazier](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f21ae68e33267ca570c896d30ffadca3c7edb4f2.gif)

_All the values can be modified with the config!_


You are allowed to use this mod in modpacks.
